name: Criteo Mobile Apps
description: Criteos app advertising product providing install, engagement and retargeting campaigns with SDK for mobile apps.

seo.title: Criteo Mobile Apps — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Criteo Mobile Apps: Criteos app advertising product providing install, engagement and retargeting campaigns with SDK for mobile apps.

when_to_use: App install campaigns with Criteo's commerce data for e-commerce apps
Retargeting high-value lapsed app users using purchase intent signals
Engagement campaigns targeting users who viewed products but didn't buy
Cross-device retargeting for retail and travel mobile apps

pros: Global sales team with enterprise support
cons: In-app offering less mature than web DSP
SDK can be heavy for smaller apps
review.verdict: Strong pick for ecommerce apps already in Criteo's ecosystem, weaker for pure gaming UA.
review.best_for: Retail and commerce apps leveraging Criteo's shopper intent graph for retargeting.
review.not_for: Gaming or non-commerce apps where Criteo's shopper data adds no value.
